articles.title: Man, 29, killed in daytime shooting in Dorchester
articles.description:
Authorities have not publicly identified the victim.

The post Man, 29, killed in daytime shooting in Dorchester appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A 29-year-old man was shot and killed in Dorchester during the daytime.
Authorities have not yet identified the victim or released further details.
The shooting raises concerns about public safety in the Dorchester community.
